body:
This PR changes the name `ρe` to `ρe_tot`. I don't have strong opinions about this, but @yairchn suggested that this is a better name. Let's agree on a form and either:

 - merge this
 - Change `ρe_tot` in the TC energy branch to `ρe`

I'd appreciate feedback on this since it's necessary for the models to agree on variable names.
title: Change name from rhoe to rhoe_tot

body:
This PR adds a command line argument `idealized_insolation`. It also adds more RE examples in ci.

Note: It changes the sw absorption coefficient from 0 back to 0.22, otherwise the gray radiative equilibrium crashes with some oscillation near the top. I think it's fine for now, although it would be good to check more carefully at some point. I would like to merge it in to see if the long run still works.
title: add more re examples to ci
